steps.name: implementation
steps.acceptance: src/train_apple.py written; TarFlow1DMol training loop working; forward-inverse consistency verified

result.note: train_apple.py with MultiMoleculeDataset, final-ckpt evaluation, two bug fixes applied to train_phase3.py

steps.name: phase1_sanity_gate
steps.acceptance: Ethanol T=9, TarFlow1DMol, 5k steps: VF >= 90% (reproduces und_001)

result.note: VF=95% on ethanol T=9, 5k steps. Gate PASSED.

steps.name: phase2_padding_val
steps.acceptance: Ethanol T=9 vs T=21 with padding mask: |VF(T=9) - VF(T=21)| < 10pp, both >= 85%

bugs_fixed: Sampling: zero padding latent before reverse pass (Bug 1)
Attention: causal-only mask, no padding key masking (Bug 2)

steps.name: phase3_sanity_multimol
steps.acceptance: All 8 molecules, T=21, 20k steps: VF > 50% ethanol AND mean VF > 40%

steps.name: phase3_heuristics
steps.acceptance: Sweep lr x ldr: best config achieves VF >= 50% on >= 4/8 molecules (if sanity promising)

steps.name: phase3_scale
steps.acceptance: Increased capacity (channels=384+, 50k steps): VF >= 50% on >= 4/8 molecules (if heuristics insufficient)

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir; src/ reflects current practice; pre-merge checks pass

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Merged to main with tag hyp_010; pre-merge checks pass
